title: OpenCode Auto Fallback Configuration
description: Configuration for automatic model fallback on rate limits and errors

enabled.description: Enable or disable the auto-fallback plugin

autoUpdate.description: Automatically check for and install plugin updates on startup
Automatically check for and install plugin updates on startup

defaultFallback.description: Default fallback model chain. Inherited by agents without their own fallback. When omitted, only agents with explicit fallback in the agents map will trigger fallback.

defaultLargeContextModel.description: Default model to switch to when an agent's context window fills up. Inherited by agents without their own largeContextModel. Set false to disable large context fallback by default.

defaultMinContextRatio.description: Default minimum fractional increase in context window required to trigger large context fallback. Default 0.1 = 10%. Inherited by agents without their own minContextRatio.

agents.description: Per-agent configuration. Key is agent name (matched case-insensitively, whitespace ignored). Fields inherit from top-level defaults when omitted.

cooldownMs.description: Cooldown duration in milliseconds after immediate fallback (prevents rapid fallback loops)

maxRetries.description: Maximum retry attempts with exponential backoff before switching to fallback chain

agentConfig.description: Per-agent settings. Omitted fields inherit from top-level defaults.

fallback.description: Agent-specific fallback model chain. Overrides defaultFallback.

oneOf.description: Single fallback model for this agent

largeContextModel.description: Model to switch to when this agent's context fills up. Overrides defaultLargeContextModel. Set false to explicitly disable large context fallback for this agent.

minContextRatio.description: Minimum fractional increase in context window to trigger fallback for this agent. Overrides defaultMinContextRatio.
